records.files_endpoints: api/, core/, storage/, workers/, adapters/, gui/, rules/, schemas/, prompts/
records.definition_of_done: Folders exist with README stubs and import-safe package layout
records.why_this_order: Lets prompts target small files instead of one giant ask.

records.definition_of_done: hub.db initializes with schema_version, jobs, files, folders, events
records.why_this_order: Everything else needs durable state.

records.definition_of_done: API/worker payloads validate and reject malformed JSON
records.why_this_order: Prevents endpoint drift.

records.definition_of_done: Can create/get/claim/finish/fail/retry jobs
records.why_this_order: Every action becomes a job first.

records.definition_of_done: Can register folder and return effective policy
records.why_this_order: Folders need profiles, not scripts.

records.definition_of_done: File created/changed/deleted event creates normalized event + job
records.why_this_order: Low-code automation begins here.

records.definition_of_done: Heavy jobs pause when thresholds exceeded
records.why_this_order: Prevents automation from hurting machine usability.

records.definition_of_done: Read-only scan produces files, hashes, excerpts, classifications
records.why_this_order: Creates filecard evidence without touching files.

records.definition_of_done: Risky jobs create approval cards; approve/reject/defer works
records.why_this_order: Safety valve before rename/move.

records.definition_of_done: Can suggest names, show GUI card, apply approved rename, rollback
records.why_this_order: Renaming is the first serious operator surface.

records.definition_of_done: Symptom scan returns findings and plan, no auto-clean
records.why_this_order: Connects the existing symptom registry to action planning.

records.definition_of_done: Every applied action has before/after; rollback works for rename/move
records.why_this_order: Trust foundation.

records.definition_of_done: Converts selected files while preserving originals
records.why_this_order: High utility after safety is stable.

records.definition_of_done: Exact duplicates detected; near duplicate prototype optional
records.why_this_order: Good cleanup value; deletion still blocked.

records.definition_of_done: FTS search over names/tags/summaries/excerpts
records.why_this_order: Makes the system fast.

records.definition_of_done: Ollama task returns schema-valid JSON for rename/tag/folder summary
records.why_this_order: Local advisor after deterministic pipeline exists.

records.definition_of_done: Unknown extension lookup uses safe metadata and caches result
records.why_this_order: Outside knowledge without exposing private content.

records.definition_of_done: Writes hidden .pof sidecars or DB-only based on policy
records.why_this_order: Human-readable portable state.

records.definition_of_done: User edits create preference events and affect future suggestions
records.why_this_order: Learning only after safe baseline.

records.definition_of_done: Desktop/laptop queue offline events and sync to Synology hub
records.why_this_order: Redundancy after core works.

records.definition_of_done: File movement/similarity graph renders from actions/edges
records.why_this_order: Useful for diagnosing drift/anomaly.

records.definition_of_done: Approved outputs copy to site-data with manifest
records.why_this_order: Public-facing work needs full audit first.
